summarization.a: The figure shows the XPS spectra of the initial sample and of the CoO sample after 2 doses of O3 and an ALE cycle. The Co 2p1/, Co 2p3/2 and satellite peaks are highlighted.

data_extraction.a:
| Binding Energy (eV) | Initial CoO | 2 dosed of O3 | After ALE |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 805 | - | - | - |
| 800 | - | - | - |
| 795 | peak at 796 | peak at 795 | peak at 797 |
| 790 | - | - | - |
| 785 | peak at 786 | - | peak at 787 |
| 780 | peak at 781 | peak at 781 | peak at 782 |
| 775 | - | - | - |

a.question: How many species can be observed in the Co 2p3/1 and satellite peaks?
How does the Co 2p1/2 peak changes with 2 doses of ozone and after the ALE cycle?
a.answer: After 2 doses of ozone, the Co 2p1/2 increases, but decreases strongly after the ALE cycle.

a.question: Which sample has the weaker satellite peak?
a.answer: The CoO sample after 2 doses of ozone (O3).

a.question: What performance can be extracted from the figure?
a.answer: After 2 doses of ozone, the CoO film is oxidized to CO3O4.
